note: Grandparent explicitly asks to be sent recent photos — family_share_request. A direct, low-stakes inbound ask from family ('Could you send some recent photos?') that warrants action, so it routes to autonomous_action/share_photos_with_family. The prompt's human-relationship caution targets clinical/professional senders writing personally, not a benign family photo share.

input.rawContent:
From: grandma.ruth@gmail.com
Subject: more pics please!! 😍

Hi sweetheart, we miss the little one SO much. Could you send some recent photos when you get a chance? Grandpa wants to print one for the fridge. No rush. Love you xx
